response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source leadership, and exposure to AI-agent tooling at Stripe, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, or advanced AI education — key requirements for a director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure at Stripe with MCP code generators
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership across diverse domains
Demonstrated ability to build and ship production systems across cloud, web, and embedded
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product or platform ownership beyond tooling support
Lacks advanced degree in AI or related field; education is BS in CS only
No clear evidence of strategic cloud product roadmapping or customer advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI Degree or Strategic Leadership
